monster.name: MesusuMercone
monster.description: Mesusu Mercone is the captain of the flying ship *Airborne*. Short and stocky as expected of a dwarf, she wears her hair in tight braids under a reinforced leather helm. She has sailor's calloused hands and a voice that cuts through the headwind without needing to shout. She wears a worn but clean military jacket with the Airborne insignia sewn on the shoulder. She speaks directly, no frills. She doesn't waste time with pleasantries but isn't rude — simply efficient. She has a habit of drumming her fingers on her sword pommel when someone talks too much.
